summary: Iteration 28 — VERIFIED fix for 'Add Company Save button not able to save firm'. The submit-company Pressable in /app/frontend/app/companies.tsx sits at rect.top=1000.28 in a 390x844 viewport (below the fold) but is now inside a keyboard-aware ScrollView so scroll_into_view_if_needed brings it into view and tapping it fires POST /api/companies → 200, closes the modal, and the new company appears in the list. Backend 4/4 pytest PASS (create + list + edit + delete via the exact modal payload including company_code IT28XXXX). Edit flow (Save changes) uses the same testID and is reachable via the same scroll. TextInputs remain focusable/editable — ScrollView does NOT intercept touches. Regression smoke on /(tabs)/profile, /kyc, /companies clean. Super_admin PIN NOT touched. Deprecated packages detected: none new (pre-existing RN-Web warnings only: shadow* style props and props.pointerEvents, carried over from iter-27).

issues: submit-company Pressable is well below the initial visible area (rect.top=1000 at viewport height=844). This is functionally fine now (ScrollView + scroll_into_view_if_needed) but a first-time user on a small phone may not realise they must scroll inside the sheet. Consider a sticky/pinned footer for the primary CTA (Pressable in a footer View outside ScrollView, or padding + a subtle 'scroll for more' visual). Non-blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: 'shadow*' style props still deprecated on RN Web (rolled over from iter-27). Reference: multiple StyleSheet.create blocks including /app/frontend/app/companies.tsx L734 (fab shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset).
props.pointerEvents deprecated on RN Web; use style.pointerEvents (pre-existing warning, still present in iter-28).

action_items: OPTIONAL UX polish: pin the primary CTA (submit-company) to the bottom of the sheet as a sticky footer instead of scrolling with the content, so mobile users on small viewports immediately see 'Create company' / 'Save changes' without scrolling. This is a design/UX improvement, not a functional bug — the fix already delivers the required scrollable behaviour.

Follow-up (unchanged from iter-27): migrate shadow* style props → boxShadow, and props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents across /app/frontend/app/*.tsx to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings on every screen.
critical_code_review_comments: companies.tsx maxHeight:'88%' with an internal ScrollView is correct and matches the fix. Note the sheet minHeight:'50%' — combined with 88% max, this locks the sheet height to a fixed range; verify on tablets/desktop-web wide viewports the 88% cap doesn't leave the CTA inside a very tall sheet that scrolls unexpectedly (minor).

The debounced address auto-lookup effect (companies.tsx L125-144) fires whenever `address` changes AND `open` is true; not tied to this fix but note that on Edit-open the effect will immediately re-geocode the pre-filled address if len>=6, potentially overwriting the persisted lat/lng. The skipAutoRef guard already covers pickResult/useMyLocation but not openEdit. Consider setting skipAutoRef.current=true inside openEdit as well to avoid a subtle race on first render of the edit sheet.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — Add flow POST 200, modal closed, new row visible; Edit flow submit reachable + visible

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral OTP super_admin session (llc_session_token) + one company (cmp_71c2b2292f, name TEST_iter28_XXXX, code IT28UIXX) created via UI then DELETE ?force=true. Super_admin pin_hash / pin_must_change / pin_fail_count / pin_locked_until UNTOUCHED. One pre-existing test company remained (cmp_6e12f31f69) — used read-only for the Edit-modal reachability test; not modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The submit-company button IS still below the initial fold at 390x844 (rect.top≈1000). To tap it in Playwright/Puppeteer you MUST call scroll_into_view_if_needed on the locator before force-click. On a real touch device this maps to the user scrolling the sheet body upward — which is exactly the behaviour the ScrollView enables and the user could not do in the pre-fix build. Do not conclude 'button hidden' if the initial screenshot doesn't show it — scroll first. For super_admin auth, POST /api/auth/otp/request + otp/verify returns {session_token: 'otp_...'}; store as localStorage.llc_session_token before navigating to /companies.
rca_of_issue: PRE-FIX ROOT CAUSE: The sheet in the Companies Add/Edit modal was a plain <View> with maxHeight:'88%'. After Phase C added the Company Code input at the top of the field stack (name, code, office location + GPS button + helper text, address + search, coord row, radius, hint, compliance toggle, submit), the total content height on a 390x844 (or 375x667) viewport pushed the primary submit-company Pressable to y≈1000px, below the 88%-cap visible area. Because the enclosing element was a View (not scrollable) the user could NOT scroll inside the sheet to reach the button — creating the exact user-reported symptom 'not able to save firm'. FIX: wrap the sheet body in <ScrollView keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' style={{flexGrow:0,flexShrink:1}} contentContainerStyle={{paddingBottom: spacing.xl}}> so the body content is now scrollable within the sheet, and keyboard taps don't dismiss the ScrollView. VERIFICATION: (1) DOM presence of [data-testid='submit-company'] confirmed; (2) rect.top=1000.28 (still below fold — proving there is no CSS/layout hack, the content IS long); (3) scroll_into_view_if_needed brings it into the visible area; (4) force-click fires POST /api/companies → 200; (5) modal closes and the new company appears in the list. Both Add and Edit flows verified with the same testID.
